user_query:
Our SaaS site needs a purpose-built 404 experience that matches our brand voice and helps visitors recover. Please read all four inputs under input/ and produce a complete 404 package.

Inputs to read:
- input/brand_guidelines.md — our brand voice and visual identity notes
- input/site_structure.json — canonical pages and key destinations
- input/404_logs.csv — recent 404 paths and counts
- input/current_404.html — our current 404 page for audit

Deliverables to create:
1) Write output/404_copy_options.json with at least 3 copy variants in this exact array-of-objects schema:
[
  {
    "headline": "string",
    "message": "string",
    "primary_cta": {"text": "string", "url": "string"},
    "secondary_cta": {"text": "string", "url": "string"},
    "tone": "string"
  }
]
- The tone should reflect brand_guidelines.md.
- Copy must be empathetic and user-friendly.

2) Write output/link_structure.json with this exact structure:
{
  "navigation": [{"label": "string", "url": "string"}],
  "search": {"placeholder": "string", "help_text": "string"},
  "popular_pages": [{"label": "string", "url": "string"}],
  "similar_urls": [{"missing": "string", "suggest": "string", "rationale": "string"}],
  "avoid_auto_redirects": true
}
- Choose navigation and popular_pages from site_structure.json.
- Use 404_logs.csv to propose at least 3 similar_urls mappings (common missing paths to the most likely canonical pages) with a short rationale.
- Set avoid_auto_redirects to true unless a mapping is near-certain; if you include any auto-redirect recommendations, mention them only in audit_notes.md, not here.

3) Write output/design_checklist.md with a concise, scannable checklist that covers brand consistency, header/footer continuity, mobile responsiveness, WCAG accessibility, clear search access, and social proof or conversion opportunities suitable for our product.

4) Write output/seo_recommendations.md summarizing technical guidance for 404s, including noindex, proper 404 HTTP status, and canonicalization advice if needed.

5) Write output/audit_notes.md auditing input/current_404.html against best practices and our brand guidelines, then explaining how your new copy and structure resolve issues. Include a brief measurement plan for tracking/monitoring 404s.

Be specific, use the brand’s tones and destinations from the inputs, and make sure all file paths match exactly.
